description_long: This is a modern, rectangular two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The front facade features a central entry door flanked by two symmetrical windows on each side, and two small green lawns separated by a paved walkway. The exterior walls are smooth and painted in a light gray or white color, with large rectangular windows providing ample natural light to the interior. The property is enclosed by a low, horizontal slat fence, and the rear and side views reveal private garden spaces and a simple, functional layout. The interior appears to have multiple rooms, including a bathroom with blue and white cloud-patterned walls, and the overall structure is clean and geometric.
description: A modern, two-story rectangular house with a flat roof, light-colored exterior, symmetrical windows, and fenced front lawns.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry door, symmetrical windows, two green lawns, and a paved walkway leading to the entrance.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the fenced gardens, a blue-walled room, and the simple, windowless side facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wall with several windows and a glimpse of the interior room layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the fenced garden, blue-walled room, and the minimalistic side wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Central single door with two potted plants, no porch or overhang, accessed by a paved walkway.
